title: Expression and purification protocols of Homo sapiens GST-ATG4B recombinant protein
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"8nns6","text":"This protocol describes expression and purification procedures for obtaining GST-tagged human recombinant Autophagy specific de-ubiquitinase ATG4B (AuTophaGy-related protein).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"3rdpl","text":"General information","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":19}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"arpps","text":"Insert: Homo sapiens ATG4B, NM_013325.5; Expression system: E.Coli Rosetta pLyss; plasmid origin: Sascha Martens Lab, lab internal construct database number SMC1392; backbone: pGEX-4T1; plasmid resistance: Ampicillin; tags \u0026 cleavage sites: N-term GST, followed by Thrombin cleavage site, ATG4B ORF. Ext coeff:  65890 M-1 cm-1 , MW 44,3 kDa.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":319,"length":2},{"style":"sup","offset":324,"length":2}],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":28,"length":11}],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"","data":{"guid":"995C9A1AC2C811EBBBD80A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/nuccore/NM_013325.5"}}}}

materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"8i6fa","text":"Materials and Reagents","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":22}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8r2vm","text":"Escherichia coli Rosetta pLyss cells","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9e5qq","text":"Luria Bertani (LB) medium with antibiotics (final conc. 50µg/ml Ampicillin, 34µg/ml Chloramphenicol)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9c5s8","text":"IPTG (isopropyl-b-d-thiogalactopyranoside)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8m9rk","text":"37°C shaker incubator","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1ictb","text":"sterile flasks/sterile pipettes","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7nj2q","text":"tip sonicator","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"et20o","text":"Thrombin (SERVA)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"absvo","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"94esj","text":"Buffers","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":7}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"eekt0","text":" Lysis Buffer: 50 mM Hepes pH=7.5, 300 mM NaCl, 2 mM ß-mercaptoethanol (or 1mM DTT, Dithiothreitol), 1mM MgCl2, spatula tip DNAse (Sigma), Complete Protease Inhibitor Roche EDTA-free (1 tablet/50ml buffer);","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":109,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5f4l6","text":"Wash Buffer 1, 3: 50 mM Hepes pH 7.5, 300 mM NaCl, 1 mM DTT (Dithiothreitol); ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1cpvh","text":"Wash Buffer 2 (high salt): 50 mM Hepes pH 7.5, 500 mM NaCl, 1 mM DTT (Dithiothreitol); ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b0e9k","text":"Gel Filtration Buffer: 20 mM Hepes pH=7.5, 200 mM NaCl (filtered and degassed) + 1 mM DTT (Dithiothreitol)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dm630","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cr7gv","text":"Note: all purification buffers are filtered and degassed. Reducing agents (β-mercaptoethanol and Dithiothreitol) are added after degassing step.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3ct8j","text":"\nColumns:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":1,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2d1sj","text":"- GSH beads stored in 20% Ethanol (Pierce or Glutathione Sepharose 4B);                ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a0orc","text":"- S75_16/60 (GE Healthcare).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bvnd1","text":"Gels: 12% SDS-PAGE","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":6}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Transform 1 µL, mini DNA plasmid SMC1392 (~100ng/µl) into one aliquot ( 50 µL ) of chemically competent E.coli Rosetta pLyss cells according to standard protocol.
Plate cells on Amp/Cam Ty (or LB) plate and grow Overnight at 37 °C .
The following day, pick 2-3 colonies to inoculate a pre-culture of ~ 150 mL, LB (Amp/Cam) and grow Overnight at 37 °C .
In the morning, use 4 x 25 mL, pre-culture to inoculate 4 x 1 L, LB (Amp/Cam) .
Grow cultures shaking at 37 °C until OD 600 (Optical Density) = 0.4 and then switch to 18 °C .
Induce cultures when cooled down and OD 600 =0.9 is reached with 1 millimolar (mM), IPTG and carry protein expression Overnight at 18 °C .
The following day, harvest cells by spinning at 4000 rpm, 4 °C, 10 minutes in a Sorvall RC6+ centrifuge (Thermo Scientific).
Resuspend cell pellets in ~ 25 mL, ice cold lysis buffer / 1 L, cell culture , flash freeze in liquid nitrogen and store at -80 °C .

Wash 10 mL, slurry GSH beads stored in 20% Ethanol (Pierce or Glutathione Sepharose 4B) in milliQ water and finally equilibrate in cold WB1. Perform spinning at 4000 rpm, 4 °C, 3 minutes, brake=2 in a 5810R centrifuge (Eppendorf).
Thaw frozen resuspended cell pellets in Room temperature water bath and move On ice as soon as thawed.
Sonicate cells 2x30s 50% cycle, 70% Power at 4 °C using a tip sonicator.
Collect Lys sample for gel loading.
Clear lysate in a Beckmann Ultracentrifuge for 25000 rpm, 4 °C, 45 minutes, Ti45 rotor .
Collect supernatant sample.
Incubate supernatant with 5 mL, GSH beads pre-equilibrated in WB1 .
Perform binding at 4 °C for 01:00:00 , rolling.
Wash beads 2x in WB1. Each wash can be performed by gently inverting the tube a few times or by rolling the tube for 10 minutes at 4°C-> spin at 4000 rpm for 3 min at 4°C.
Take "sup W1" sample. Take "beads WB1". Wash 2x in WB2.
Take "sup W2" sample. Take "beads WB2". Wash 2x in WB3.
Take "sup WB3" sample. Take "beads WB3".
Check all fractions on a 12% SDS-gel stained with Coomassie Brilliant Blue.
Collect sample before cleavage.

Incubate beads for 05:00:00 (or less) or Overnight rolling at 4 °C with 1 vial Thrombin (SERVA) to cleave off the GST-tag. Alternatively, GST tag can be left on and protein is eluted with 50mM reduced L-Glutathione solution in WB3 pH=7.5-8. Elution for GST-tagged proteins is usually performed for 1-2 hours at 4°C, rolling.
If cleavage is performed: spin beads down and collect “Elution sample" at 4 °C (brake=2) in a 5810R centrifuge (Eppendorf).
Filter elution through a 0.2µm filter and concentrate down to 2 mL using a 10kDa cut-off Amicon filter.
Keep concentration steps short and pipette regularly to avoid protein precipitation on the filter.
In the meanwhile, collect Beads after cleavage sample and check cleavage on a 12% SDS-gel stained with Coomassie Brilliant Blue.
Inject 2 mL, concentrated protein onto a S75_16/600 Gel Filtration column pre-equilibrated in Gel Filtration Buffer.

Check fractions containing the protein of interest on gel, collect and pool. Concentrate down to reach the desired concentration, flash freeze in liquid nitrogen and store at -80 °C until use. ATG4B, MW=44,3 kDa, Epsilon=65890 M-1 cm-1 Final Gel
Sonicate cells for 00:00:30 50% cycle, 70% Power. (1/2)
Sonicate cells for 00:00:30 50% cycle, 70% Power. (2/2)
Wash beads in WB1. (1/2)
Wash beads in WB1. (2/2)
creator: Dorotea Fracchiolla
